questions.question: What was King Agrippa's famous response to Paul's testimony?
options: You are out of your mind
You almost persuade me to become a Christian
I find no fault in you
Tell me more about this Jesus
questions.answer: You almost persuade me to become a Christian

questions.question: What did Festus shout during Paul's defense?
options: You are insane, Paul — your great learning is driving you mad
questions.answer: You are insane, Paul — your great learning is driving you mad

questions.question: Agrippa said Paul could have been set free if he had not appealed to Caesar.
Jesus told Paul on the road, 'It is hard for you to kick against the _____.'
Paul said he was not _____ to the heavenly vision he received from Jesus.
